description_long: This is a modern baseball bat with a vibrant blue barrel and a metallic silver handle. The barrel is smooth and tapers gradually towards the handle, which is wrapped in a textured grip tape for secure handling. The top of the barrel features a white brand logo and text, adding a touch of detail to the otherwise solid blue surface. The handle is cylindrical and appears to be wrapped in a crisscross pattern, providing both comfort and grip. The end cap is rounded and blue, matching the barrel, and appears to be made of a durable plastic or rubber material. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for use in parks, sports fields, or urban recreational areas.
description: A sleek blue baseball bat with a silver grip-taped handle and a white brand logo on the barrel. The bat features a rounded blue end cap and a crisscross grip pattern for secure handling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue barrel with a visible white brand logo and the silver grip-taped handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth blue barrel and the full length of the silver grip tape, with no visible logo.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the side, showing the blue barrel and silver handle, with no visible markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the blue barrel and silver grip tape, with no visible logo or markings.
attribute_brand_logo: A white logo and text are visible near the top of the barrel, centered and horizontally aligned, medium size.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: The grip tape is silver with a crisscross wrapping style, providing a textured, grippy surface with no visible logos or additional designs.
attribute_barrel_markings: White text and logo are present near the top of the barrel, clean and modern in style.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is rounded, blue, and appears to be made of plastic or rubber, with a smooth texture and no visible logos or markings.
